card_description: S.F. Writers is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick explores the "Man from the Future" theory, suggesting that his 74 experience was a "retroactive mending" of the past by a sentient entity traveling backward from the end of time."
